title: Create automation to stop all timetracking at a certain cadence
excerpt: I want to automate all time-tracking to stop at a certain interval (every 30 mins/ every hour) so that my actual time tracking is not overrun. Then start of each hour can be a deliberate choice, what am I working on now? …

posts.author: jpvnaicker (Jason Naicker)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to automate all time-tracking to stop at a certain interval (every 30 mins/ every hour) so that my actual time tracking is not overrun. Then start of each hour can be a deliberate choice, what am I working on now?
